mapper.select:
select t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.publish_no , t1.publish_code , t1.publish_date , t1.payment_type , t1.payment_year , t1.payment_month , t1.budget_fund , t1.budget_special_fund , t1.bank_loans , t1.self_fund , t1.status , t1.remark , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.creation_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity from jg_payment_plan t1
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.SECRET_LEVEL like concat(concat('%',#{bean.secretLevel}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectId}),'%')
and t1.PUBLISH_NO like concat(concat('%',#{bean.publishNo}),'%')
and t1.PUBLISH_CODE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.publishCode}),'%')
and t1.PUBLISH_DATE >= #{bean.publishDateBegin}
and t1.PUBLISH_DATE <= #{bean.publishDateEnd}
and t1.PAYMENT_TYPE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.paymentType}),'%')
and t1.PAYMENT_YEAR like concat(concat('%',#{bean.paymentYear}),'%')
and t1.PAYMENT_MONTH like concat(concat('%',#{bean.paymentMonth}),'%')
and t1.BUDGET_FUND like concat(concat('%',#{bean.budgetFund}),'%')
and t1.BUDGET_SPECIAL_FUND like concat(concat('%',#{bean.budgetSpecialFund}),'%')
and t1.BANK_LOANS like concat(concat('%',#{bean.bankLoans}),'%')
and t1.SELF_FUND like concat(concat('%',#{bean.selfFund}),'%')
and t1.STATUS like concat(concat('%',#{bean.status}),'%')
and t1.REMARK like concat(concat('%',#{bean.remark}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_01 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute01}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_02 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute02}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_03 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute03}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_04 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute04}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_05 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute05}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and ${sfnConditions.sql}
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY =#{org}
order by t1.creation_date desc

select t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.publish_no , t1.publish_code , t1.publish_date , t1.payment_type , t1.payment_year , t1.payment_month , t1.budget_fund , t1.budget_special_fund , t1.bank_loans , t1.self_fund , t1.status , t1.remark , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.creation_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity from jg_payment_plan t1 where t1.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into jg_payment_plan
id,
secret_level,
project_id,
publish_no,
publish_code,
publish_date,
payment_type,
payment_year,
payment_month,
budget_fund,
budget_special_fund,
bank_loans,
self_fund,
status,
remark,
attribute_01,
attribute_02,
attribute_03,
attribute_04,
attribute_05,
created_by,
last_updated_by,
last_update_date,
creation_date,
last_update_ip,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{publishNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{publishCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{publishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{paymentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{paymentYear,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{paymentMonth,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{budgetFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{budgetSpecialFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{bankLoans,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{selfFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{creationDate},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

insert into jg_payment_plan( id, secret_level, project_id, publish_no, publish_code, publish_date, payment_type, payment_year, payment_month, budget_fund, budget_special_fund, bank_loans, self_fund, status, remark, attribute_01, attribute_02, attribute_03, attribute_04, attribute_05, created_by, last_updated_by, last_update_date, creation_date, last_update_ip, version, created_dept, org_identity)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.publishNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.publishCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.publishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.paymentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.paymentYear,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.paymentMonth,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.budgetFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.budgetSpecialFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.bankLoans,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.selfFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdateDate}, #{item.creationDate}, #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update jg_payment_plan
id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publish_no =#{publishNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publish_code =#{publishCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publish_date =#{publishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payment_type =#{paymentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
payment_year =#{paymentYear,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
payment_month =#{paymentMonth,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
budget_fund =#{budgetFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
budget_special_fund =#{budgetSpecialFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
bank_loans =#{bankLoans,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
self_fund =#{selfFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status =#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark =#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate},
creation_date =#{creationDate},
last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version =version+1,
created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update jg_payment_plan set id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_no =#{publishNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_code =#{publishCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_date =#{publishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payment_type =#{paymentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_year =#{paymentYear,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, payment_month =#{paymentMonth,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, budget_fund =#{budgetFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, budget_special_fund =#{budgetSpecialFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, bank_loans =#{bankLoans,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, self_fund =#{selfFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status =#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark =#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate}, creation_date =#{creationDate}, last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update.foreach: update jg_payment_plan set id =#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_no =#{item.publishNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_code =#{item.publishCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publish_date =#{item.publishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payment_type =#{item.paymentType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_year =#{item.paymentYear,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, payment_month =#{item.paymentMonth,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, budget_fund =#{item.budgetFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, budget_special_fund =#{item.budgetSpecialFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, bank_loans =#{item.bankLoans,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, self_fund =#{item.selfFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status =#{item.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark =#{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_updated_by =#{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{item.lastUpdateDate}, creation_date =#{item.creationDate}, last_update_ip =#{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version =#{item.version};
